llm.name: llm
llm.description: LLM service — text generation, classification, extraction, summarization

actions.name: classify
actions.description: Classify text into one of the given categories.

actions.name: extract
actions.description: Extract structured data from text according to a JSON schema.

actions.name: summarize
actions.description: Summarize text with optional length and style constraints.

credentials.description: Anthropic API key (use this OR OPENAI_API_KEY)
OpenAI API key (use this OR ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)

data.name: data
data.description: Data service — CRUD operations on entities

discovery.name: discovery
discovery.description: Service discovery — register and find services

session.name: session
session.description: Session management — create, get, list, clear agent sessions

memory.name: memory
memory.description: Memory service — user preferences and generation history

agent.name: agent
agent.description: Agent service — send messages and manage generation

actions.name: generateOrbitals
actions.description: Generate Orbital schemas from a natural-language prompt.

actions.name: generateFix
actions.description: Generate a fix for an existing schema given validation errors.

actions.name: generateDomainLanguage
actions.description: Generate a domain language definition from a description.

actions.name: getFile
actions.description: Read a file from a repository at a given ref

params.name: path
params.description: Path to file within the repo

actions.name: listCommits
actions.description: List commits on a branch or path

params.name: path
params.description: Restrict to commits touching this path

llm-integration.name: llm-integration
llm-integration.description: LLM integration — generate, embed, classify via external providers

youtube.name: youtube
youtube.description: YouTube Data API — search videos, get video/channel details

email.name: email
email.description: Email service — send, send with template

credentials.description: SendGrid API key (use this OR RESEND_API_KEY)
Resend API key (use this OR SENDGRID_API_KEY)

storage.name: storage
storage.description: Object storage — upload, download, delete, list files

queue.name: queue
queue.description: Message queue — publish, subscribe, acknowledge messages

cli.name: cli
cli.description: CLI tool execution — run commands, get output
